title: Getting Gertie's Garter
writer: Wilson Collison, Tay Garnett, Avery Hopwood
actors: Marie Prevost, Charles Ray, Harry Myers
plot: Attorney Ken Walrick, not quite realizing the difference between a garter and a bracelet, gives Gertie Darling a bejewelled garter with his photograph in miniature attached. But then he must cover his indiscretion by getting the g...
